reviews.review_description: This game is bad yes but it’s still somewhat playable I got this because I’m a fan of SCPs so why not I gave it a try and I liked it a lot the character molders don’t look that bad yes it could use a lot of work but it could be fun maybe develop the game a little more I think you are harsh on this game for telling people not to get it all you need to do is make it better add more gamemodes make it able for me to play with bots there is a lot more you could do maybe get a team of people maybe even make a battle pass or if you don’t want to do that make people unlock more SCPs as they play and maybe more classes for the humans this game has a lot of potential and you should try to get this game to that potential maybe add in a story mode hire some people hire some SCP YouTubers you have a lot of possibilities with this that’s my whole review I hope you see this
Idk if anyone else plays this cuz when I join there’s no players and that I’m by myself😭

reviews.review_description:
Secure - Contain - Protect

Protect your life. Aliens attack our bunker (backroom).

Sandbox.

Multiplayer, Singleplayer, and Creatortool. 

Are you ready for one of the games, that play in Roswell, New Mexico?

Good.

Download it, install it on your Quest3 Headset and run for your life.

reviews.review_description: This game is great but every time when I join the game it keeps on making me join a public server and I want to play in a private server and when I leave the public server it makes me join back and when I do it again it loads forever, edit: i heard that the original scp 173 is copyrighted so yea, edit 2: like gtag, you should add something for the og players

The game has a ton of potential and definitely has the ability to receive a massive player base, and I’m hoping the full version is as good as I’m hoping it will be.

Some things I’ve noticed that could be changed include the Need to make the security teams gun less glitchy by which I mean make the reloading better, as the ammo clip sometimes goes down your arm instead of in your hands, more teams like maybe E-11, or MTF, containment cells for scp’s so that the researchers can run tests, etc
No one plays it :(
Good game just needs more scps

now I like the fact that you can be any one (or thing) and have special abilities and equipment 
Great potential

No foundation site looks like this, not on the outside or inside. There's no excuse for this given the fact that there is an abundance of FREE reference material on YouTube (Dr. Bob and SCP Explained). I don't think the developers understand that The Foundation has a pretty big fanbase and they're not going to be able to just make it up as they go or outright change the landscape to make it more dystopian (edgy).

developer_response.body: im just lazy tbh lol this game got a lot more people playing it than i expected

reviews.review_description: So at the moment each server is limited to 5 people, one per role, and the locomotion and hit boxes are a little janky and the guns and health are a little weird, the maps are bare, but fun to explore, but considering this game is in the Alpha stage, that's all easily fixable, and this game, if more scp's are added, and more people are allowed to play as d class and security guards, then this game can and will be my favorite game. I'm genuinely excited for future updates because this game could be so amazing

developer_response.body: Thanks! The next update increases the limit for how many people can be dclass and guard. Also the health is fixed with scps (except 173) being killable and shooting scps will now slow them down. Should be a lot more balanced.

reviews.review_description: The game has a good concept but once you play it its not a amazing game. First of all the map is terrible and you dont know where to even go. There is also no tutorial or anything on what to do so if your a new player u might be stuck in the menu for 20 mins figuring out what to do

Joined a game with 6 people who were all kids. Very glitchy hit boxes, but that actually made it better since I could walk into walls as a class-d. I love the guns already because you can either choose to hold them normally like a regular person, or just gangster fire it. Knowing how great some SCP games can become, (including some Gmod and Roblox versions) I cannot wait for this to be fully developed. I just hope the developers work on mechanics before graphics. No beautiful game is good unless you can lift the tab on a soda can.

The game right now its kinda bad but i now this game is in very beta versión so there is alot more to expect and if you see it in a way that in this very early version the already have weapons and reload mechanism and scps i'd say its going well and i expect alot of this game in the future updates
